llmResponse.agendaChanges: The recording begins at reconvene to open session (Section 4); the closed session and pre-reconvene items (Sections 1–3) occurred before the recording. The Report Out on Closed Session and Welcome were delivered together by President Wells at the start of the recording without a distinct break. Sections 4 Roll Call, Report Out, and Welcome all occur in rapid sequence at the opening. The Consent Items (Section 13) encompassed all items through Section 31 as a single bundle vote. Action Items followed the consent bundle. Board and Superintendent Reports, Information, and adjournment closed the meeting. No items were pulled from consent. No other resequencing noted.

items.title: Call to Order
items.notes: Occurred before recording began (closed session called to order at 6:30 PM per minutes)

items.title: Roll Call (Closed Session)
items.notes: Occurred before recording began

items.title: Public Comment on Closed Session Items Only
items.notes: Occurred before recording began; minutes note 'None'

items.title: Closed Session - 6:30 PM
items.notes: Occurred before recording began

items.title: Reconvene to Open Session
Roll Call (Open Session)
Report Out on Closed Session from August 19, 2025
items.notes: President Wells reported the 5-0 vote to initiate IDEA due process complaint

items.title: Welcome
items.notes: President Wells welcomed attendees and provided Spanish interpretation instructions starting around 67s

items.title: Changes to the Agenda
items.notes: President Wells asked for changes; none reported

items.title: Approval of the Agenda
Public Comment
items.notes: No public comment received

items.title: Approval of the Bond Program Consent Items
Bond Program Action Items
items.notes: None — no action items were presented

items.title: Discussion Items — Discussion of Parcel Tax Survey Findings and Recommended Next Steps

publicComments.name: Jessica Shade
publicComments.summary: Expressed strong parent support for the parcel tax, noted the square-footage structure is more equitable, and urged all hands on deck given how close the polling numbers are to the two-thirds threshold.

publicComments.name: Carlo Contavalli
publicComments.summary: Urged the board to put the measure on the ballot and let voters decide, citing urgent funding needs and the risk of continued cuts if nothing is done.

publicComments.name: Brandon Matthews
publicComments.summary: Offered full-throated support for the parcel tax on behalf of the Unidos PTO at Adelante Selby, specifically praising its progressive, equitable structure and opposing a cap.

items.title: Discussion Items — Discussion of School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the 2025–26 School Year
Public Hearing — Sufficiency of Instructional Materials for the 2025-2026 School Year
items.notes: Public hearing opened at 8:11 PM (~4183s) and closed at 8:12 PM (~4275s); no public speakers

items.title: Approval of Consent Items (Action Required) — Full Bundle
items.notes: Bundle included all items listed under Section 13 through Section 31 of the agenda (items 13.1 through 13.22 per minutes numbering, plus food service bid extensions and warrant ratifications)
